description_long: This is a short section of a classic wooden picket fence, featuring evenly spaced vertical slats with rounded tops. The fence is supported by two horizontal rails, one near the base and one about halfway up, connecting the slats and providing structural stability. The wood appears to be stained a medium brown, giving it a natural and rustic appearance suitable for residential yards, parks, or gardens. The fence sits on a patch of green, grassy ground, suggesting outdoor placement. There are no visible decorative elements or post caps, and the design is simple and functional. The overall construction is lightweight and likely intended as a visual or low-security barrier.
description: A short, brown wooden picket fence with rounded tops and two horizontal rails, set on grassy ground. The design is simple, functional, and suitable for outdoor urban or residential settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the picket fence with all vertical slats and both horizontal rails visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence, with only the edges of the slats visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the vertical slats and horizontal rails from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge profile of the fence.
